name: ono-project-inspector
description: Inspects an existing software repository and gradually builds a structured, approval-gated AI knowledge base for it (CLAUDE.md, AUDIT.md, docs/project/, and per-topic audit documents), then syncs approved findings back into CLAUDE.md. Never modifies source code.

source.note: For LOCAL development the marketplace serves the plugin from a symlink under plugins/ that points at the sibling Ono-ProjectInspectorPlugin repo. When the plugin is published to GitHub, replace this with a github source in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.

_note: This file is a human-readable descriptor for the ono-project-inspector plugin. Claude Code reads the authoritative plugin entry from .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and the plugin's own .claude-plugin/plugin.json. This descriptor documents the plugin within the marketplace repo.
